description_long: This object consists of six upright flags, each mounted on a tall, gold-colored pole with a round base. The flags represent different countries and organizations, including the United States, Russia, the United Kingdom, Austria, the European Union, and France. Each flag is made of fabric and displays its respective national or organizational colors and symbols, such as stars, stripes, crosses, and emblems. The poles are topped with decorative finials, adding a formal and ceremonial appearance. The flags are arranged in a straight line, with each flag hanging naturally and slightly draped. The bases are sturdy and designed to keep the flags upright in indoor or outdoor urban settings.
description: A set of six ceremonial flags on gold poles with round bases, each displaying distinct national or organizational designs. The flags are arranged in a line and feature vibrant colors and detailed emblems.
description_view_0: Six flags are clearly visible from the front, each with unique designs and colors, all mounted on gold poles with round bases.
description_view_1: The flags are viewed edge-on, making them appear closely aligned and mostly obscuring their designs, with only the pole tops and flag edges visible.
description_view_2: The flags are seen from the opposite side, showing the reverse of each flag's design and arrangement, with all six flags and bases visible.
description_view_3: The flags are again viewed edge-on from the opposite direction, with the flag surfaces mostly hidden and only the edges and pole tops visible.
attribute_flag_design: The flags feature the national designs of the United States (stars and stripes in red, white, and blue), Russia (white, blue, and red horizontal stripes), the United Kingdom (Union Jack with red, white, and blue crosses), Austria (red-white-red horizontal stripes), the European Union (blue field with yellow stars in a circle), and France (vertical blue, white, and red stripes). Each flag is proportionally sized to fit the pole and is free of text.
